message.content:
Run the "deep-research" workflow.

Deep research harness — fan-out web searches, fetch sources, adversarially verify claims, synthesize a cited report.

When the user wants a deep, multi-source, fact-checked research report on any topic. BEFORE invoking, check if the question is specific enough to research directly — if underspecified (e.g., "what car to buy" without budget/use-case/region), ask 2

# Git Memory

Portable, tool-agnostic project memory using git commit messages and
PR body as the durable substrate.

## Invocation policy

> **The skill is an invocation gate, not a trailer gate.**

Two distinct decisions must not be conflated:

| Decision | Who decides | When |

Continue the loom-comms-overhaul close-out. State: all 21 plan tasks committed on feat/loom-comms-overhaul (24 commits, suite 150 passed); ONLY the whole-branch review remains — both code-reviewer panel arms died on session-limit (resets 10:50am Asia/Taipei). If current time is before ~10:50, just ScheduleWakeup again (3600s, same prompt). If past 10:50, re-dispatch the TWO loom-code:code-reviewer arms with the byte-identical prompts used before (diff main...HEAD; rubrics under loom-code/skills/subagent-driven-development/; docs/loom/PRINCIPLES.md for D8; run pytest loom-pipeline/scripts/ and quote count; LOOM-SIMPLIFY grep; full verdict structure), then union findings, re-aggregate, mint gate marker via loom_gate_markers.py review-pass, and relay the verdict to the user in plain conversation-language per the relay discipline. Do not push or create a PR without explicit user re-authorization.
